'''najaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycotoxin|mycotoxin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycotoxin|mycotoxin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| najaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næjæjæth|næjæjæth]] || [[word:næjæjæj|næjæjæj]] || [[word:næjæjæsh|næjæjæsh]] || [[word:næjæjæ|næjæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:najajajath|najajajath]] || [[word:najajajaj|najajajaj]] || [[word:najajajash|najajajash]] || [[word:najajaja|najajaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:najajath|najajath]] || [[word:najajaj|najajaj]] || [[word:najajash|najajash]] || [[word:najaja|najaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:najafjath|najafjath]] || [[word:najafjaj|najafjaj]] || [[word:najafjash|najafjash]] || [[word:najafjaf|najafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:najajatha|najajatha]] || [[word:najajaja|najajaja]] || [[word:najajasha|najajasha]] || [[word:najajaka|najajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:najajath|najajath]] || [[word:najajaj|najajaj]] || [[word:najajash|najajash]] || [[word:najaja|najaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:najajathal|najajathal]] || [[word:najajajal|najajajal]] || [[word:najajashal|najajashal]] || [[word:najajakal|najajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:najajathatha|najajathatha]] || [[word:najajajaja|najajajaja]] || [[word:najajashasha|najajashasha]] || [[word:najajaka|najajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:najajathan|najajathan]] || [[word:najajajan|najajajan]] || [[word:najajashan|najajashan]] || [[word:najajakan|najajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:najajathaoro|najajathaoro]] || [[word:najajajaoro|najajajaoro]] || [[word:najajashaoro|najajashaoro]] || [[word:najajakaoro|najajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
